pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_scaling_loadbalancer/setup_task.sh#L17-L125 and export_result.sh#L6-L63 both assign PROJECT_DIR=/home/ga/scaling-app for creation, teardown, and verification steps.

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_scaling_loadbalancer/verifier.py#L7-L138 enforces replicas=3 via scoring plus export_result.sh#L58-L63 heuristically searches for "replicas: 3" in docker-compose.yml.

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_scaling_loadbalancer/setup_task.sh#L91-L125 maps nginx ports to "8080:80" and export_result.sh#L18-L34 makes curl requests to http://localhost:8080 for load-balancing checks.

privileged_info_summary: setup_task.sh synthesizes the Flask+Redis+Nginx compose project under /home/ga/scaling-app so verification.txt captures agent output, and the verifier expects exactly three Flask replicas behind the Nginx front end listening on localhost port 8080.
